translation.hero_desc: Trade commodities, earn AgriCredits pegged to Government MSP, and connect directly with 1.8 crore farmers across 23 states. No middlemen, no delays.

hero_desc: Trade commodities, earn AgriCredits pegged to Government MSP, and connect directly with 1.8 crore farmers across 23 states. No middlemen, no delays.
step1_desc: 60-second sign-up with mobile OTP. Get 50 AgriCredits as welcome bonus.
step2_desc: Upload photo, enter quantity & grade. MSP valuation auto-calculated in AgriCredits.
step3_desc: Two nearby farmers endorse your listing. Fake listings can never mint credits.
step4_desc: Buyer's credits locked at bid. Credits auto-release only after you confirm delivery.
feature_desc: Built for India's 14 crore farmers. Every feature has a reason.
f1_desc: 1 AC = ₹22.75 (wheat MSP/kg). Government MSP revisions keep your credits valuable.
f2_desc: Buyer's payment locked until delivery confirmed. No fraud, no delays — mathematically guaranteed.
f3_desc: Trade within 20km radius. Practical delivery windows + strong local trust networks.
f4_desc: 2 verified farmers endorse each listing before credits are created. No fake produce.
f5_desc: Live surplus/deficit analytics per village. Know the market before you sell.
f6_desc: OTP keypad designed for KaiOS devices. No app download, minimal data usage.
ac_p1_desc: 1 AC = ₹22.75 (wheat MSP per kg). Government revises MSP annually — your credits adjust too.
ac_p2_desc: Credits locked at bid. You deliver crop -> credits auto-release. No payment delays, no disputes.
ac_p3_desc: Trade 2000 AC? Pay 20 AC. You keep 1980 AC. Traditional mandi charges 2–5% — we're always cheaper.
ac_p4_desc: List (+5 AC), Complete trade (+10 AC), Verify farmer (+15 AC), Refer (+50 AC).
ac_p5_desc: Credits inactive 12+ months decay at 2%/month. Keeps the economy liquid.
ref_desc: Government MSP 2024-25. Auto-calculated in real time.
cta_title: Ready to Change How India Farms?
cta_desc: Join 1.8 crore farmers already trading on AgriTrade. 50 AgriCredits credited instantly on signup.
